unicode-segmenter Performance Over Time

Track throughput changes across different benchmark scenarios and platforms (higher is better)

Lorem ipsum (ascii)
Emojis
Hindi
Demonic characters
Tweet text (combined)
Code snippet (combined)
Apple M4 Pro / Node.js - Performance History
4 data points from 2025-03-07 to 2026-07-07

Performance Changes

Scenario First (2025-03-07) Latest (2026-07-07) Change
Lorem ipsum (ascii) 3.64 µs 2.98 µs ↑ 18.1% faster
Emojis 1.24 µs 942.51 ns ↑ 24.0% faster
Hindi 4.13 µs 3.13 µs ↑ 24.2% faster
Demonic characters 1.24 µs 644.41 ns ↑ 48.0% faster
Tweet text (combined) 5.68 µs 4.45 µs ↑ 21.7% faster
Code snippet (combined) 13.59 µs 10.79 µs ↑ 20.6% faster
Apple M4 Pro / Bun - Performance History
4 data points from 2025-03-07 to 2026-07-07

Performance Changes

Scenario First (2025-03-07) Latest (2026-07-07) Change
Lorem ipsum (ascii) 3.31 µs 2.46 µs ↑ 25.7% faster
Emojis 1.79 µs 854.13 ns ↑ 52.3% faster
Hindi 5.15 µs 2.61 µs ↑ 49.3% faster
Demonic characters 1.73 µs 450.09 ns ↑ 74.0% faster
Tweet text (combined) 6.86 µs 4.21 µs ↑ 38.6% faster
Code snippet (combined) 15.40 µs 10.13 µs ↑ 34.2% faster

Scenario First (2025-03-07) Latest (2026-07-07) Change
